core_theme: Microsoft Agent Framework 用 Agent loops、Workflows 和 Harnesses 三层结构，把简单聊天能力推进到可生产化的 agent 应用
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解 MAF 为什么不是单一聊天封装，而是一套让开发者按场景选择自治程度、编排方式和运行时控制的分层 SDK
summary_angle: 生产级 agent 需要分层：内层循环负责推理和工具调用，中层工作流负责可靠编排，外层 harness 提供工具、上下文、记忆、权限、日志和可观测性

information_blocks.source_anchor: Agent loops: the repeated cycle of input, context, decision, tool call, observation, state, and completion
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心旋转的 agent engine，箭头表示模型、工具、观察和状态的循环

information_blocks.source_anchor: Workflows: sequential flows, handoffs, author/critic loops, magentic-style orchestration, custom workflows
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中层轨道承载多个任务站点，表示步骤、交接、评审和协调

information_blocks.source_anchor: Harnesses: tools, context, memory, planning, middleware, permissions, human approval, logging and tracing
information_blocks.visual_idea: 外层仪表和安全阀，表示运行时能力和控制边界

information_blocks.source_anchor: Provider-agnostic composition across Microsoft Foundry, OpenAI, Anthropic, Copilot Studio, GitHub Copilot, and A2A
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧连接到多个外部供应商和协议的开放接口

main_metaphor: 一台三层黄铜工程机器，把 agent 的推理循环、业务编排和运行时控制组合在一起
primary_subject: 中心的三层抽象 agent engine
subject_action: 内层循环转动，中层工作流路由任务，外层 harness 提供工具、记忆、权限和可观测性
composition: 2.35:1 宽幅，中心三层机器，左侧三个编号标签，右侧开放连接器
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: steampunk adventure illustration, brass mechanisms, gears, goggles, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；机械分层隐喻适合表达 SDK 的循环、编排和运行时能力三层结构
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家，prompt 使用非仿冒描述词
avoid: 真实 Microsoft 图表复刻
reference_strategy: 纯文本生成；原文 diagram 单独作为正文配图，不作为像素级参考
draft_goal: 验证三层架构和 provider-agnostic 开放性是否能在一张宽封面里读出来
revision_targets: 如果像真实架构图，改为更明确的概念机器插画
如果标签太多，压缩为四个短标签
如果开放接口出现假指标或假图例，改为抽象连接器
final_prompt: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration for a Chinese tech blog article about Microsoft Agent Framework's layered SDK design. Theme: moving from simple chat apps to production agents through Agent loops, Workflows, and Harnesses. Keep one dominant central layered brass agent engine and source-grounded callouts: 循环/1, 编排/2, 运行/3, 开放. Base style: isometric conceptual systems scene. Selected style: steampunk adventure illustration with brass mechanisms, gears, warm industrial light, handcrafted machinery. Wide 2.35:1 cover. Avoid real Microsoft diagram reproduction, fake dashboards, fake charts, fake terminals, fabricated metrics, long text, slogans, and watermark.
